overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic horror game showing an FBI agent exploring a foggy Pacific Northwest forest, traversing obstacles, and investigating a rustic wooden cabin. The atmosphere is tense with dense fog, muted colors, and detailed environmental storytelling.

events.description: emerging from narrow rocky passage into wider forest area
sighting FBI partner ahead on the trail

agents.ego_description: walking through the dense foggy forest investigating the trail ahead

notable_agents.action: FBI partner walking ahead on the forest path

dense evergreen forest canopy shrouded in fog
narrow winding trail through the woods

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow rocky forest passage that opens into a wider trail. An FBI partner is visible ahead walking in the same direction. The environment is dense with fog and tall pine trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail with wooden barricade approaching cabin

approaching wooden cabin clearing through the trees

segments.scene_description: The character climbs over a wooden barrier blocking the path and continues through the forest toward a rustic wooden cabin. The terrain shifts from rocky to dirt trail as the cabin becomes visible through the trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark cabin interior with dining area

interior is dimly lit, flashlight illuminates the wooden walls and furniture

rustic table with plates and metal pitcher

small window letting in diffused daylight
tall cabinet with books and pottery

segments.scene_description: Inside the dark cabin, the character explores with a flashlight illuminating wooden walls, a dining table with chairs, and shelves with various items. The space is enclosed and dimly lit with light coming through small windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy forest trail descending from cabin

events.description: exiting the cabin back into the foggy forest
descending slope away from the cabin area

agents.ego_description: leaving the cabin and continuing down the forest path away from the structure

entered.detail: tall evergreen trees in the fog
narrow trail leading away from cabin
decaying logs on the forest floor
exterior of the cabin now behind the character

segments.scene_description: The character exits the cabin back into the foggy forest and descends along a path away from the structure. The scene returns to the dense woodland environment with fallen logs and thick vegetation.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dense, foggy forest through the interior of a rustic cabin and back into the woodland. It begins by following an FBI partner through a narrow rocky passage that opens into a wider trail flanked by towering pine trees. As the camera moves forward, the terrain shifts to a dirt path where the character climbs over a wooden barrier before the forest opens up to reveal a weathered wooden cabin. The scene then transitions inside the dimly lit structure, where a flashlight cuts through the darkness to illuminate wooden walls, a dining table, and cluttered shelves. Finally, the camera exits the cabin and descends a path back into the thick vegetation and fallen logs of the foggy forest.
